channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Erling Haaland invests in chess and stars as a Viking when not playing for Norway
item.description: The soccer star leads Norway in the World Cup quarterfinals while backing a chess championship and voicing an animated Viking.

item.title: Wall Street firm pays Gen Z interns $8,600 weekly, more than typical monthly salary
item.description: Susquehanna offers master's and Ph.D. interns up to $86,000 for 10 weeks, plus free housing and meals.

item.title: Over one million women lose humanitarian aid due to Trump budget cuts
item.description: Nearly 90% of surveyed women's groups cannot meet needs, and one in five expect to close temporarily or permanently.

item.title: Wyoming officials say Meta's 715,000-square-foot data center is responsible for contaminating its water system with a rare bacterium
item.description: Cheyenne's Board of Public Utilities tightened its wastewater discharge policy after discovering Cupriavidus gilardii in its treatment facility.
